[EQUIP Chaos] (Chaos: Attach this to a unit you control.)
[GANKING] (I can move from battlefield to battlefield)

name: Windsinger
description:
[HIDDEN] (Hide now for 1 Rune to reach later for 0.)
When you play me, you may return another unit at a battlefield with 3 Might or less to its owner's hand.
flavorText: She never sticks around for encores.

name: Switcheroo
description:
[HIDDEN] (Hide now for 1 Rune to reach later for 0.)
[ACTION] {Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Swap the Might of two units at the same battlefield this turn.
flavorText: Always look out for the little guy.

name: Draven - Audacious
description:
[DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay 1 Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.)
The first time I win a combat each turn, you score 1 point.
When I die in combat, choose an opponent. They score 1 point.

name: Draven - Audacious (Alternate Art)
description:
[DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay 1 Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.)
The first time I win a combat each turn, you score 1 point.
When I die in combat, choose an opponent. They score 1 point.

name: Last Rites
description:
[EQUIP] — Chaos, Recycle 2 cards from your trash. (Pay the cost: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When I conquer or hold, you may play a unit from your trash. (You still pay its costs.)

name: Rek'Sai - Swarm Queen
description: When I attack, you may reveal the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. You may play one. Then recycle the rest. If the played card is a unit, you may play it here.
flavorText: "KKRRKRKRRKKRKK!"

name: Rek'Sai - Swarm Queen (Alternate Art)
description: When I attack, you may reveal the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. You may play one. Then recycle the rest. If the played card is a unit, you may play it here.
flavorText: "KKRRKRKRRKKRKK!"

name: Fiora - Worthy
description: When a unit you control becomes [MIGHTY], you may pay Order to ready it. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ Might.)
flavorText: "Strike quickly. Strike deftly."

name: Fiora - Worthy (Alternate Art)
description: When a unit you control becomes [MIGHTY], you may pay Order to ready it. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ Might.)
flavorText: "Strike quickly. Strike deftly."

name: Treasure Hoard
description: When you conquer here, you may pay 1 to play a Gold gear token exhausted.

name: Draven - Glorious Executioner (Overnumbered)
description: When you win a combat, draw 1. (You win if only your units remain after combat.)

name: Fiora - Grand Duelist (Overnumbered)
description: When one of your units becomes [MIGHTY], you may exhaust me to channel 1 rune exhausted. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ Might.)

name: Void Drone
description: I cost 2 less to play from anywhere other than your hand.
flavorText: Rek'Sai's children appear without warning, ambushing their prey from beneath the shuriman sands.

name: Boneshiver
description:
[EQUIP 1 Body] (1 Body: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When I conquer, channel 1 rune exhausted. Might +2.

name: Renata Glasc - Industrialist
description: Your tokens enter ready.
flavorText: "Nothing's free. All I ask is your loyalty."

name: Against the Odds
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a friendly unit at a battlefield +2 Might this turn for each enemy unit there.
flavorText:
"We are what we overcome."
—Pantheon

name: Stellacorn Herder
description: When I move, draw 1.
flavorText: "Finding lost stellacorns is easy! It's catching them that's the hard part."

name: Void Hatchling
description: If you would reveal cards from a deck, look at the top card first. You may recycle it. Then reveal those cards.
flavorText: From the moment of hatching, xer'sai serve their queen.

name: Aphelios - Exalted
description:
When you attach an Equipment to me, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn —
•Ready 2 runes.
•Channel 1 rune exhausted.
•Buff a friendly unit.

name: Power Nexus
description: When you hold here, you may pay Rune Rune Rune Rune to score 1 point.

name: Vex - Cheerless
description: While I'm in combat, friendly spells cost 1 Rune less to a minium of 1, and enemy spells cost 1 Rune more.
flavorText: "Let's turn these smiles upside down."

name: Ezreal - Dashing
description:
When I attack or defend, deal damage equal to my Might to an enemy unit here.
I don't deal combat damage.
Mind: [ACTION] — Move me to your base.
flavorText: "Time for a true display of skill."

name: Royal Entourage
description: When you play me, ready or exhaust a legend.
flavorText: After the seat of the ancient Shuriman Empire rose from the sands and its immortal emperor stepped out of myth to lead it, those who first embraced his rule were richly rewarded.

name: Gem Jammer
description: When you play me, give a unit [GANKING] this turn. (It can move from battlefield to battlefield)
flavorText: "You have GOT to see this."

name: Not So Fast
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter an enemy spell or ability that chooses a friendly unit or gear.

name: Ravenbloom Conservatory
description: When you defend here, reveal the top card of your Main Deck. If it's a spell, put it in your hand. Otherwise, recycle it.

name: Darius - Executioner (Overnumbered)
description:
LEGION - When you play me, ready me. (Get the effect if you've played another card this turn)

Other friendly units have +1 might here.
flavorText: "Even in death, I cannot lay down my axe."

name: Darius - Executioner (Signature)
description:
LEGION - When you play me, ready me. (Get the effect if you've played another card this turn)

Other friendly units have +1 might here.
flavorText: "Even in death, I cannot lay down my axe."

name: Frostcoat Cub
description:
You may pay Mind as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, give a unit -2 Might this turn.
flavorText: In the Freljord, cuteness is just another survival tactic.

name: Ferrous Forerunner
description: [DEATHKNELL] — Play two 3 Might Mech unit tokens to your base. (When I die, get the effect.)
flavorText: "You see a wreck waiting to happen. I just see parts that aren't spare yet."

name: Rengar - Pouncing
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve, including to a battlefield you control.)
[ASSAULT 2] (+2 Might while I'm an attacker.)
I can be played to a battlefield you're attacking.
flavorText: "Tonight, we hunt!"

name: Dunebreaker
description:
If you have two or fewer cards in your hand, I enter ready.
When I hold, draw 2.
flavorText: Dunes don't break like branches. They break like waves.

name: Thwonk!
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[REPEAT] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Stun an attacking unit. (It doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)

name: Brutalizer
description:
[EQUIP Calm] (Calm: Attach this to a unit you control.)
If this was attached to me this turn, I have an additional +2 Might.
+1 Might.

name: Azir - Ascendant (Alternate Art)
description: Calm: [ACTION] — Choose a unit you control. Move me to its location and it to my original location. If it's equipped, you may attach one of its Equipment to me. Use only once per turn.
flavorText: "Challenge Shurima, challenge fate."

name: Azir - Ascendant
description: Calm: [ACTION] — Choose a unit you control. Move me to its location and it to my original location. If it's equipped, you may attach one of its Equipment to me. Use only once per turn.
flavorText: "Challenge Shurima, challenge fate."

name: Jax - Unmatched
description:
[DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay 1 Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.)
Each Equipment in your hand has [QUICK-DRAW]. (It gains [REACTION]. When you play it, attach it to a unit you control.)
flavorText: "Fighting Words! My favorite kind."

name: Jax - Unmatched (Alternate Art)
description:
[DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay 1 Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.)
Each Equipment in your hand has [QUICK-DRAW]. (It gains [REACTION]. When you play it, attach it to a unit you control.)
flavorText: "Fighting Words! My favorite kind."

name: Needlessly Large Yordle
description:
[SHIELD 5] (+5 Might while I'm a defender.)
[TANK] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)
I cost 2 and 1 Calm less for each point you scored from holding this turn.
flavorText: How did a yordle get so big? You're welcome to ask him.

name: Ornn - Blacksmith
description: When you play me or when I hold, look at the top 4 cards of your Main Deck. You may reveal a gear from among them and draw it. Then recycle the rest.
flavorText: "Gods do not need followers. Followers need gods."

name: Ornn - Blacksmith (Alternate Art)
description: When you play me or when I hold, look at the top 4 cards of your Main Deck. You may reveal a gear from among them and draw it. Then recycle the rest.
flavorText: "Gods do not need followers. Followers need gods."

name: Tianna Crownguard
description:
[DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay 1 Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.)
While I'm at a battlefield, opponents can't score points.
flavorText: "I will stand for my country, my family, and nothing else."

name: Bubble Bot
description: When you play me, ready another friendly Mech.
flavorText: The first Bubble Bot started as a practical joke in the scrapyard, but the Mark II soon replaced the morning wake-up bell.

name: Chemtech Cask
description: When you play a spell on an opponent's turn, you may exhaust me to play a Gold gear token exhausted.
flavorText:
"Piltover coos over perfumes while Zaun struggles to breathe."
—Renata Glasc

name: Breakneck Mech
description:
Your Mechs have [DEFLECT] and [GANKING]. (Opponents must pay 1 Rune to choose us with a spell or ability. We can move from battlefield to battlefield.)
I enter ready if you control another Mech.

name: Experimental Hexplate
description:
[EQUIP Calm] (Calm: Attach this to a unit you control.)
I am a mech.
+1 Might

name: Prize of Progress
description: When you use an activated ability of a gear, give me +1 Might this turn.
flavorText: In Piltover's Progress Day parade, even the floats are groundbreaking innovations.

name: Bard - Mercurial
description:
You may exhaust your legend as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, move any number of your units to an open battlefield.
flavorText: (Mysterious chiming noises intensify.)

name: Ezreal - Dashing (Alternate Art)
description:
When I attack or defend, deal damage equal to my Might to an enemy unit here.
I don't deal combat damage.
Mind: [ACTION] — Move me to your base.
flavorText: "Time for a true display of skill."

name: Jayce - Man of Progress
description: When you play me, you may kill a friendly gear. If you do, you may play a gear with Energy cost no more than 7 from hand this turn, ignoring its Energy cost. (You must still pay its Power cost.)
flavorText: "This is what the future looks like."

name: Ornn - Forge God
description:
[DEFLECT 2] (Opponents must pay 2 Runes to choose me with a spell or ability.) [WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for 1 Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
I have +1 Might for each friendly gear.

name: Ornn - Forge God (Alternate Art)
description:
[DEFLECT 2] (Opponents must pay 2 Runes to choose me with a spell or ability.) [WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for 1 Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
I have +1 Might for each friendly gear.

name: Yordle Explorer
description: When you play a card with Power cost 2 Runes or more, draw 1.
flavorText: "We can't stop yet! We're just getting started!"

name: Rek'sai - Void Burrower (Overnumbered)
description: When you conquer, you may exhaust me to reveal the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. You may play one. Then recycle the rest.

name: Lucian - Purifier (Overnumbered)
description: Your Equipment each give [ASSAULT]. (+1 Might while equipped unit is an attacker.)

name: Yone - Blademaster (Overnumbered)
description:
[WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
When I conquer an open battlefield, deal damage equal to my Might to an enemy unit in a base.

name: Yone - Blademaster (Signature)
description:
[WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
When I conquer an open battlefield, deal damage equal to my Might to an enemy unit in a base.

name: Corina Veraza
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 and Order as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
When I move to a battlefield, play three 1 Might Recruit unit tokens here.
flavorText: "I told them that every achievement has its cost. I didn't tell them who would pay it."

name: Azir - Sovereign
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 and Order as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
When I attack, you may move any number of your token units to this battlefield.
flavorText: "You need not follow, but you must witness."

name: Azir - Sovereign (Alternate Art)
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 and Order as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
When I attack, you may move any number of your token units to this battlefield.
flavorText: "You need not follow, but you must witness."

name: Renata Glasc - Industrialist (Alternate Art)
description: Your tokens enter ready.
flavorText: "Nothing's free. All I ask is your loyalty."

name: Downwell
description: Return all units and gear to their owners' hands.
flavorText: Sunk costs have a very painful definition in Bilgewater Bay

name: Sivir - Ambitious
description:
[DEFLECT 2] (Opponents must pay to choose me with a spell or Ability.)
When I conquer after an attack, if you assigned 5 or more excess damage to enemy units, you may deal that much to an enemy unit.
flavorText: "Honor is the rust on a dull blade."

name: Sivir - Ambitious (Alternate Art)
description:
[DEFLECT 2] (Opponents must pay to choose me with a spell or Ability.)
When I conquer after an attack, if you assigned 5 or more excess damage to enemy units, you may deal that much to an enemy unit.
flavorText: "Honor is the rust on a dull blade."

name: Ancient Henge
description: Exhaust: [REACTION] — Pay any amount of Energy to [ADD] that much Rune. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)
flavorText: "It's not enough to protect a pile of ice and stone. We must protect each other, and build a community on the foundations our ancestors left us." —Ashe

name: Xin Zhao - Vigilant
description:
[TANK] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)
I enter ready if you have two or more other units in your base.
flavorText: "A Demacian does not retreat!"

name: Undertitan
description:
When you play me, give your other units +2 Might this turn.
As I'm revealed from your deck, [ADD] 2.
flavorText: If it stayed under, it would be less of a problem.

name: Trove Golem
description: When you play me, play four Gold gear tokens exhausted.
flavorText: As expensive as it is expansive.

name: Soraka - Wanderer
description:
I must be assigned combat damage last.
If another unit you control here would die, if it has less Might than me, instead heal it, exhaust it, and recall it. (Send it to base. This isn't a move.)
flavorText: "Never waste a breath."

name: Sacred Shears
description:
[EQUIP Order] (Order: Attach this to a unit you control.)
[DEATHKNELL] - Draw 1. (When I die, get the effect.)
+1 Might

name: Jae Medarda
description: When you choose me with a spell, draw 1.
flavorText: A scion of the militant Medarda family, Jae seeks enchanted treasure rather than power or glory.

name: Fizz - Trickster
description: When you play me, you may play a spell from your trash with Energy cost no more than 3, ignoring its Energy cost. Recycle that spell after you play it. (You must still pay its Power cost.)
flavorText: "One jump ahead of you."

name: Marching Orders
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[REPEAT 3] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Choose a friendly unit anywhere and an enemy unit at a battlefield. They deal damage equal to their Mights to each other.

name: Aspiring Engineer
description: When you play me, return a gear from your trash to your hand.
flavorText: "Before you know it, I'll be running this place."

name: Ornn's Forge
description: While you control this battlefield, the first friendly non-token gear played each turn costs 1 less.

name: Rek'Sai - Breacher
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 Fury as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
[ASSAULT] (+1 Might while I'm an attacker.)
Friendly units played from anywhere other than a player's hand have [ACCELERATE].

name: Vanguard Armory
description: Exhaust: Play three 1 Might Recruit unit tokens. (You may play them to different locations.)
flavorText: It takes more than a sword and shield to make a soldier. But it's a good start.

name: Glasc Mixologist
description: [DEATHKNELL] — You may play a unit with cost no more than 3 and no more than from your trash, ignoring its cost. (When I die, get the effect.)
flavorText: "The difference between medicine and poison is the dosage."—Renata Glasc

name: Drag Under
description:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
I cost less to play from anywhere other than your hand.
Kill a unit at a battlefield.
flavorText: "If we hurry, we can reach the oasis by nightfall."—Common last words

name: Royal Guard
description: When you play me, play a 2 Might Sand Soldier unit token here.
flavorText: A ruler's true power is in the loyalty they inspire.

name: Bonds of Strength
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[REPEAT 2] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Give two friendly units each +1 Might this turn.
flavorText: A vow is stronger than the words that make it.

name: Hard Bargain
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[REPEAT 2] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Counter a spell unless its controller pays 2.

name: Punch First
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Give a unit +5 Might this turn.
flavorText: It's not for the inquisitive.

name: Production Surge
description:
This costs 2 less if you control a Mech.
Play a 3 Might Mech unit token to your base.
Draw 1.
flavorText: When in doubt, make more mechs.

name: Rocket Barrage
description:
[REPEAT 4 Mind] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect, and may make different choices.)
Choose one —
• Deal 4 to a unit in a base.
• Kill a gear.

name: Disarming Rake
description: When you play me, you may kill a gear.
flavorText: "I like to break things: swords, arms, hearts..."

name: Guardian of the Passage
description: When I hold, you may return a unit or gear from your trash to your hand.
flavorText: In the Shadow Isles, the veil between life and death is thin indeed.

name: Lonely Poro
description: [DEATHKNELL] — If I died alone, draw 1. (When I die, get the effect. I'm alone if there are no other friendly units here.)
flavorText:
Far from fluft and all alone
None to mourn but ice and stone
—Ode to a Lonely Poro

name: Apprentice Smith
description: When I move, reveal the top card of your Main Deck. If it's a gear, draw it. Otherwise, recycle it.
flavorText: "My mentor says every failed project is a lesson. Me, I use 'em as paperweights."

name: Legion Quartermaster
description: As an additional cost to play me, return a friendly gear to its owner's hand.
flavorText: "An ancient runeblade! Very rare. Take it to Tent 3 for processing."

name: Janna - Savior
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve, including to a battlefield you control.)
When you play me, heal your units here, then move an enemy unit from here to its base.
flavorText: "Gale winds unleashed!"

name: Ruin Runner
description: I can't be chosen by enemy spells and abilities.
flavorText: "Catch me if you can."

name: Card Sharp
description: When you play me, you and each opponent may play a Gold gear token exhausted. For each opponent who did, you play a Gold gear token exhausted.
flavorText: "Call."

name: Hextech Anomaly
description: Exhaust: [REACTION] — Pay any amount of Runes to [ADD] that much Energy. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)
flavorText: "Hextech promises to transform the present. But progress must not come at the future's expense!"— Heimerdinger

name: Rumble - Scrapper
description:
Your Mechs have +1 Might (including me).
When I hold, play a 3 Might Mech unit token to your base.
flavorText: "Ever look up to a yordle?"

name: Rumble - Scrapper (Alternate Art)
description:
Your Mechs have +1 Might (including me).
When I hold, play a 3 Might Mech unit token to your base.
flavorText: "Ever look up to a yordle?"

name: The Zero Drive
description:
[EQUIP 1, Calm] (1, Calm: Attach this to a unit you control.)
3, Calm, Banish this: Play all units banished with this, ignoring their costs. (Use only if unattached.)
[DEATHKNELL] — Banish me. (When I die, get the effect.)
Might +2

name: Fiora - Peerless
description: When I attack or defend one on one, double my Might this combat.
flavorText: "I have no equal."

name: Fiora - Peerless (Alternate Art)
description: When I attack or defend one on one, double my Might this combat.
flavorText: "I have no equal."

When you play this from face down, attach it to a unit you control here.
[Equip Chaos] (Chaos: Attach this to a unit you control.)
+2 Might
flavorText: Every shadow an ally.

Exhaust: Attach an attached Equipment you control to a unit you control.

description:
[UNIQUE] (Your deck can have only 1 card with this name.)

name: Blood Rush
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[REPEAT 1] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Give a unit [ASSAULT 2]. (+2 while it's an attacker.)

name: Bushwack
description:
[HIDDEN] (Hide now for 1 Rune to react with later for 0.)
Friendly units enter ready this turn. Play a Gold gear token exhausted.

description: Kill a gear. Its controller draws 2.
flavorText: Nobody wants to be left holding the explosive end of the stick.

description: I enter ready.
flavorText: There are two kinds of drakehound trainer: strict, and dead.

description:

description:
[UNIQUE] (Your deck can have only 1 card with this name.)
[EQUIP Rune] (Rune: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When you play this, ready your units.

description:

Might +0
